Scroll to Top

All Releases

Here you can find all currently supported releases.

If there are any issues downloading them from this location, MCCC may also be downloaded for free from my Patreon page. MCCC and MC Woohoo may also be downloaded from the support Discord server here. This channel does not require any special authentication or roles to access. You just have to sign on to Discord after clicking the link and you'll be at the files.

False virus warnings can happen from the links on this page and Tumblr due to some virus scanners blocking entire file servers on MediaFire when one file on that server is questionable. There are more details on the FAQ page here.

The Mirror link for each download is for MediaFire. If anyone has issues downloading from the primary link, then they can try that link to see if it works better for them.

If you are looking for an older version of MCCC than what I have listed here, you should read this.

Public Releases

Release Link Compatibility Change log Mirror
MC Command Center 2026.4.0 This has been tested to be working with (but does not require) all expansions and game packs up to Royalty & Legacy and the patch released July 21, 2026 - PC: 1.126.58.1030 / Mac: 1.126.58.1230. It will also work with anything after that Sims 4 update unless otherwise specified on Tumblr/Patreon posts I make after the update. Earlier Sims 4 versions may not be compatible so we often do not support anything below the specified version here! 2026.4.0 Changes MediaFire Link
MC Woohoo 2026.4.0 Has the same version requirements as MC Command Center described above and requires MC Command Center to work correctly. MediaFire Link
MC Command Center 2026.3.0 This has been tested to be working with (but does not require) all expansions and game packs up to Royalty & Legacy and the patch released April 28, 2026 - PC: 1.123.85.1020 / Mac: 1.123.85.1220. It will also work with anything after that Sims 4 update unless otherwise specified on Tumblr/Patreon posts I make after the update. Earlier Sims 4 versions may not be compatible so we often do not support anything below the specified version here! 2026.3.0 Changes MediaFire Link
MC Woohoo 2026.3.0 Has the same version requirements as MC Command Center described above and requires MC Command Center to work correctly. MediaFire Link
MC Command Center 2026.2.0 This has been tested to be working with (but does not require) all expansions and game packs up to Royalty & Legacy and the patch released April 28, 2026 - PC: 1.123.85.1020 / Mac: 1.123.85.1220. It will also work with anything after that Sims 4 update unless otherwise specified on Tumblr/Patreon posts I make after the update. Earlier Sims 4 versions may not be compatible so we often do not support anything below the specified version here! 2026.2.0 Changes MediaFire Link
MC Woohoo 2026.2.0 Has the same version requirements as MC Command Center described above and requires MC Command Center to work correctly. MediaFire Link
MC Command Center 6.6.0(Legacy Edition Release) This has been tested to be working with (but does not require):
GTW, OR, Get Together, Dine Out, City Life, Vampires, Parenthood, Cats & Dogs, Jungle Adventures, Seasons, Get Famous, Strangeville, Island Living, Realm of Magic and the patch released October 3, 2019
PC 1.56.52.1020 / Mac 1.56.52.1220.
This is also the version to get if you use the Legacy Edition of Sims 4. Earlier Sims 4 versions may not be compatible so we often do not support anything below the specified version here! 		6.6.0 Changes
MC Woohoo 6.6.0 Has the same version requirements as MC Command Center described above and requires MC Command Center to work correctly.

Private Releases

Private releases are available to Basic Tier or above patrons on my Patreon site. These early releases are not feature complete and often have defects still in them as they are still "in progress". Also, translations are not available in these releases until they are in Release Candidate status. More information can be found on my Patreon Site.
